author: Peyton Tolbert
name: Model Stack Runtime-Row BitNet 65M, SP1024, Context 4096
blurb: Non-record BitNet-style ternary run using runtime-row scales so the trained Parameter Golf artifact exports exactly into Model Stack's packed BitNet runtime. 64.5M parameters, 4096-token context, 14.41MB total submission size, and exact packed runtime export verification.
